title: viola purpurea var. dimorpha
intro: Viola purpurea var. dimorpha, also known as the small-flowered violet or purple violet, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the violet family (Violaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Viola purpurea var. dimorpha include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote wound healing. Viola purpurea var. dimorpha can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or topical ointment, and its extracts are also used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
